mapper.insert: INSERT INTO replyReport(replyReportno, replyno ,rdate, memberno, reason) VALUES (replyReport_seq.nextval, #{replyno}, sysdate, #{memberno}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT replyReportno, rdate, replyno, memberno, reason FROM replyReport ORDER BY replyReportno DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replyReport WHERE replyno = #{replyno}

SELECT rr.replyReportno, rr.replyno, rr.memberno, m.id AS reporter_id, m.nickname AS reporter_nickname, rr.reason, TO_CHAR(rr.rdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS report_date FROM replyReport rr INNER JOIN member m ON rr.memberno = m.memberno WHERE rr.replyno = #{replyno} ORDER BY rr.rdate DESC
SELECT DISTINCT replyno FROM replyReport ORDER BY replyno DESC
SELECT r.replyno, r.content, m.memberno, m.id, m.nickname FROM reply r JOIN member m ON r.memberno = m.memberno WHERE r.replyno = #{replyno}

SELECT rr.replyReportno AS "replyReportno", rr.memberno AS "memberno", rr.reason AS "reason", TO_CHAR(rr.rdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "report_date", m.id AS "reporter_id", m.nickname AS "reporter_nickname" FROM replyReport rr JOIN member m ON rr.memberno = m.memberno WHERE rr.replyno = #{replyno}
